title: mentha lucandiana
intro: Mentha lucandiana, also known as Corn Mint or European Pennyroyal, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The medicinal properties of Mentha lucandiana include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which are derived from its essential oil. The health benefits of this plant include relieving digestive issues, alleviating menstrual cramps, and reducing anxiety and stress. Mentha lucandiana can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and it is also used in traditional cooking and as a flavoring agent in various beverages and desserts.
